responses: The StaxTech internship is a one month virtual learning program where students complete projects in domains like Artificial Intelligence, Machine Learning, Web Development and Cloud Computing.
The internship runs from 20 February 2026 to 20 March 2026.
Yes. Interns may receive certificates like Internship Completion Certificate, Project Certificate and Experience Certificate based on performance.
Beginner projects include Calculator, To-Do List, Quiz Game, Password Generator and Rock Paper Scissors Game.
Advanced projects include Blog Website, E-Commerce Website and Student Management System.
A portfolio is a personal website that showcases your skills, projects and achievements. It usually includes sections like About Me, Skills, Projects and Contact.

For internship queries contact StaxTech.
Email: Staxtechinfo@gmail.com
Founder: Mr Pawan Kushwaha
LinkedIn: StaxTech
